description_long: This is a white NYPD police car with blue and red emergency lights mounted on the roof. The vehicle features prominent blue 'NYPD' lettering on the sides, along with the department's shield and precinct information. The front and rear both display 'POLICE' in blue, with the rear also showing a large blue number '4173'. The car has a black push bumper on the front, standard police wheels, and visible side mirrors. The windows are tinted, and the car is equipped with a roof antenna. The overall design is sleek and functional, typical of modern urban police vehicles.
description: A white NYPD police car with blue markings, roof-mounted red and blue lights, and detailed police insignia and text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the push bumper, windshield, and roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'NYPD' text, police shield, and emergency light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large '4173' number, 'POLICE' text, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible 'NYPD' text and police insignia.
attribute_police_markings: Blue 'POLICE' text on the hood, trunk, and rear; large blue 'NYPD' on both sides; blue horizontal stripes along the sides; black '4173' on the roof and rear; precinct and unit numbers on the sides; smaller text such as 'Courtesy, Professionalism, Respect' in red on the sides.
attribute_emergency_lights: Roof-mounted light bar with alternating red and blue rectangular lights arranged in a row; visible from all sides.
attribute_police_insignia: NYPD shield badge on both front doors, colored gold and blue.
attribute_license_plate: White license plate with blue text and numbers, located at the front and rear of the vehicle.
